lastT = ts;\r\n    if (G.state !== prevSt) {\r\n        showUI(G.state); if (G.state === 'gameOver') {\r\n            if (prevSt === 'playing') lastRepData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(G.rec));\r\n            goTitle.textContent = G.winner === G.human ? 'Victory!' : 'Defeat';\n            goMsg.textContent = G.winner === G.human ? 'Conquered all stars in ' + G.tick + ' ticks!' : 'Eliminated at tick ' + G.tick + '.';\r\n        } prevSt = G.state;\r\n    }\r\n    if (G.state === 'playing' || G.state === 'replay') {\n        var es = G.state === 'replay' && G.rep ? (G.rep.paused ? 0 : G.rep.speed) : G.speed; acc += rawDt * es;\n        while (acc >= TICK_DT) { gameTick(); acc -= TICK_DT; }\n        var featureName = G.mapFeature.type === 'wormhole' ? 'Wormhole' : (G.mapFeature.type === 'gravity' ? 'Gravity' : 'Standard');\n        hudTick.textContent = 'Tick: ' + G.tick + ' | ' + G.diff + ' | ' + featureName;\n        if (G.state === 'replay') repTickLbl.textContent = 'Tick: ' + G.tick;\n    }\n    if (G.state !== 'mainMenu') render(ctx, cv, G.tick);\r\n    requestAnimationFrame(loop);\r\n}\r\nshowUI('mainMenu');\r\nrequestAnimationFrame(function (ts) { lastT = ts; loop(ts); });\r\n"],"names":["TICK_DT","BASE_PROD","MAX_UNITS","NODE_RMIN","NODE_RMAX","NODE_MINDIST","NEUTRAL_MAX","FLEET_SPEED","POOL_SZ","FLOW_FRAC","DEF_FACTOR","VISION_R","SEL_BONUS","AI_INTERVAL","AI_BUF","AI_AGG","ZOOM_MIN","ZOOM_MAX","ZOOM_SPD","MAP_W","MAP_H","MAP_PAD","BEZ_CURV","BEZ_SEG","PULSE_SPD","COLORS_BG","COL_NEUTRAL","COL_FOG","COL_GRID","COL_GLOW","PLAYER_COLORS","TRAIL_LEN","MAX_ORBITERS","ORBIT_SPD","NODE_LEVEL_MAX","DDA_MAX_BOOST","WORMHOLE_SPEED_MULT","GRAVITY_RADIUS","GRAVITY_SPEED_MULT","NODE_TYPE_DEFS","AI_ARCHETYPES","DIFFICULTY_PRESETS","stars","i","RNG","s","t","a","b","hashSeed","h","dist","dx","dy","clamp","v","lo","hi","hashMix","c","d","bezCP","mx","my","len","nx","ny","bezPt","p0","cp","p2","u","bezLen","l","px","py","pt","mkFleet","pool","acquireFleet","f","G","defaultTune","net","initFog","pc","nc","ls","p","n","updateVis","fog","pi","nodes","tick","owned","vr","j","o","fleetVis","nodeTypeOf","node","nodeLevelProdMult","nodeLevelDefMult","nodeLevelCapMult","nodeCapacity","td","upgradeCost","initNodeKind","roll","nodePowerValue","computePowerByPlayer","power","fleet","pickAIProfile","aiIndex","difficultyConfig","diff","isLinkedWormhole","srcId","tgtId","w","applyMapFeature","featureRoll","bestA","bestB","bestD","center","bestNode","bestCenterDist","cd","initGame","seedStr","opts","keepReplay","keepTuning","menuFog","aiDefault","humanCount","aic","totalPlayers","localPlayerIndex","ai","genMap","pn","ni","att","placed","minDist","x","y","r","ok","fx","fy","fr","fn","corners","best","bd","cand","startBoost","baseUnits","dispatch","owner","srcIds","pct","tgt","si","src","srcType","cnt","spacing","swarmWidth","hasWormholeLink","curv","jitter","centered","combat","defMult","atk","def","fl","addFlow","rmFlow","upgradeNode","nodeId","cost","aiDecide","cmds","own","profile","useFog","humanPower","myPower","delta","assist","aggr","reserve","maxSources","targets","tu","tDef","oi","score","attackCount","ti","tn","srcs","total","needed","cands","av","fl ","issueOnlineCommand","socketEndpoint","payload","err","state","me","status","self","spIdx","normalizeReplay","raw","seed","startReplayFromData","rep","fogOn","pwd","target","speeds","syncTune","updTuneLabels","readTune","nd","sid","flowData","cn","sendData","cx","cy","cc","dragSend","sw","ew","targetIds","upgraded","acc","lastT","prevSt","loop","ts","rawDt","es","featureName"],"mappings":"ssBAOA,IAAIA,GAAU,EAAI,GAAIC,GAAY,IAAMC,GAAY,IAChDC,GAAY,GAAIC,GAAY,GAAIC,GAAe,IAAKC,GAAc,GAClEC,GAAc,GAAIC,GAAU,IAAMC,GAAY,IAC9CC,GAAa,IAAKC,GAAW,IAAKC,GAAY,IAC9CC,GAAc,GAAIC,GAAS,EAAGC,GAAS,EACvCC,GAAW,GAAKC,GAAW,EAAKC,GAAW,GAC3CC,GAAQ,KAAMC,GAAQ,IAAMC,EAAU,GACtCC,GAAW,IAAMC,GAAU,GAAIC,GAAY,GAC3CC,GAAY,UAAWC,GAAc,UAAWC,GAAU,UAC1DC,GAAW,0BAA2BC,GAAW,yBACjDC,GAAgB,CAAC,UAAW,UAAW,UAAW,UAAW,UAAW,SAAS,EACjFC,GAAY,EAAGC,GAAe,GAAIC,GAAY,IAC9CC,GAAiB,EACjBC,GAAgB,GAChBC,GAAsB,KACtBC,GAAiB,IACjBC,GAAqB,KAErBC,GAAiB,CACjB,KAAM,CAAE,MAAO,OAAQ,KAAM,EAAK,IAAK,EAAK,IAAK,EAAK,KAAM,EAAK,MAAO,EAAK,MAAO,SAAS,EAC7F,MAAO,CAAE,MAAO,QAAS,KAAM,KAAM,IAAK,GAAK,IAAK,GAAK,KAAM,IAAK,MAAO,EAAK,MAAO,SAAS,EAChG,QAAS,CAAE,MAAO,UAAW,KAAM,IAAM,IAAK,KAAM,IAAK,KAAM,KAAM,GAAK,MAAO,IAAM,MAAO,SAAS,EACvG,MAAO,CAAE,MAAO,QAAS,KAAM,IAAM,IAAK,IAAM,IAAK,IAAM,KAAM,KAAM,MAAO,KAAM,MAAO,SAAS,CACxG,EAEIC,GAAgB,CAChB,CAAE,KAAM,SAAU,KAAM,IAAK,KAAM,GAAK,QAAS,IAAM,IAAK,GAAI,EAChE,CAAE,KAAM,WAAY,KAAM,EAAK,KAAM,EAAK,QAAS,EAAK,IAAK,GAAI,EACjE,CAAE,KAAM,SAAU,KAAM,GAAK,KAAM,GAAK,QAAS,KAAM,IAAK,GAAI,CACpE,EAEIC,GAAqB,CACrB,KAAM,CACF,UAAW,IAAM,SAAU,EAAG,WAAY,GAAI,aAAc,GAC5D,UAAW,GAAO,WAAY,GAC9B,gBAAiB,IAAK,aAAc,IACpC,cAAe,KAAM,WAAY,IACjC,cAAe,IAAM,iBAAkB,CAC/C,EACI,OAAQ,CACJ,UAAW,EAAK,SAAU,EAAG,WAAY,GAAI,aAAc,GAC3D,UAAW,GAAO,WAAY,GAC9B,gBAAiB,EAAK,aAAc,EACpC,cAAe,EAAK,WAAY,EAChC,cAAe,IAAM,iBAAkB,CAC/C,EACI,KAAM,CACF,UAAW,KAAM,SAAU,EAAG,WAAY,GAAI,aAAc,GAC5D,UAAW,GAAM,WAAY,GAC7B,gBAAiB,IAAM,aAAc,IACrC,cAAe,IAAM,WAAY,KACjC,cAAe,IAAM,iBAAkB,CAC/C,CACA,EAGIC,GAAQ,CAAA,EAAI,QAASC,GAAI,EAAGA,GAAI,IAAKA,KAAID,GAAM,KAAK,CAAE,EAAG,KAAK,OAAM,EAAKvB +const ROOM_CODE = 'MAIN';

+const DEFAULT_ROOM_CONFIG = {
+    seed: '42',
+    nodeCount: 16,
+    difficulty: 'normal',
+    fogEnabled: false,
+};
 
 const rooms = new Map();

 function nowTick(startEpochMs) {
     return Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now() - startEpochMs) / (1000 / TICK_RATE)));
 }
 
-function isAdmin(socketId) {
-    return adminSocketId === socketId;
+function normalizeDifficulty(raw) {
+    const value = String(raw || DEFAULT_ROOM_CONFIG.difficulty).toLowerCase();
+    if (value === 'easy' || value === 'normal' || value === 'hard') return value;
+    return DEFAULT_ROOM_CONFIG.difficulty;

+function normalizeNodeCount(raw) {
+    const value = Number(raw);
+    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return DEFAULT_ROOM_CONFIG.nodeCount;
+    return Math.max(8, Math.min(30, Math.floor(value)));

-    for (const [id] of io.of('/').sockets) {

-    }
+function normalizeRoomConfig(payload = {}) {
+    return {
+        seed: String(payload.seed || DEFAULT_ROOM_CONFIG.seed),
+        nodeCount: normalizeNodeCount(payload.nodeCount),
+        difficulty: normalizeDifficulty(payload.difficulty),
+        fogEnabled: payload.fogEnabled === true,
+    };
+}
+
+function sanitizePlayerName(name) {
+    return String(name || '').trim().slice(0, 20);
+}
+
+function getOrCreateRoom(configPayload = {}) {
+    let room = rooms.get(ROOM_CODE);
+    if (room) return room;
+
+    room = {
+        code: ROOM_CODE,
+        hostId: '',
+        createdAt: Date.now(),
+        maxPlayers: MAX_ROOM_PLAYERS,
+        started: false,
+        startedAt: 0,
+        players: [],
+        config: normalizeRoomConfig(configPayload),
+    };
+    rooms.set(ROOM_CODE, room);
+    return room;
 }

-    const readyCount = room.players.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (votes.has(p.socketId) ? 1 : 0), 0);

         hostId: room.hostId,
         isHost: room.hostId === socketId,
         started: room.started,
